name: feature.priority-matrix.nodes
description: Priority Matrix feature node pack (ADR 0058 / ADR 0014) — read + write nodes over the ctx.features['priority-matrix'] surface shipped by the Priority Matrix feature package. Lets a workflow (or a chat agent via the agent pack) capture ideas, score them, read the ranking, and generate a planning agenda.
author: OpenWOP App

nodes.label: Priority Matrix: List Lists
nodes.description: Lists the workspace's priority lists (id, name, criteria) over ctx.features['priority-matrix']. Tenant-guarded.

nodes.label: Priority Matrix: List Portfolio
nodes.description: Lists the workspace portfolio — ideas across ALL the tenant's lists, ranked by computed priority (ADR 0060) — over ctx.features['priority-matrix'].listPortfolio. Inputs: { topN? }. Output: { items }. Tenant-trusted aggregate.

nodes.label: Priority Matrix: List Ranked Ideas
nodes.description: Lists a list's ideas ranked by computed weighted priority (descending) over ctx.features['priority-matrix']. Tenant-guarded.

nodes.label: Priority Matrix: Submit Idea
nodes.description: Submits a new idea/request into a priority list (lands in the New status) over ctx.features['priority-matrix']. Tenant-guarded.

nodes.label: Priority Matrix: Score Idea
nodes.description: Scores one idea against the list's criteria (criterionId → 1..10) and returns its recomputed priority, over ctx.features['priority-matrix']. Tenant-guarded.

nodes.label: Priority Matrix: Generate Planning Agenda
nodes.description: Generates a planning-session agenda from a list's top-N ideas over ctx.features['priority-matrix']. Tenant-guarded.

nodes.label: Priority Matrix: Schedule Status
nodes.description: Derives each idea's ahead/behind schedule state (on-track / at-risk / behind / done-early / done-late / unscheduled) from its target date + card status, plus a list rollup (ADR 0103), over ctx.features['priority-matrix']. Tenant-guarded.
